requirement_topic.en: Kahramaa Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: Kahramaa BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: Kahramaa BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation) is the sole Transmission and Distribution System Owner and Operator (TDSOO) in Qatar. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale and behind-the-meter projects — require Kahramaa technical review and grid-connection approval. Kahramaa's Grid Code (Transmission Grid Code 2020) sets technical requirements for generation and storage assets connected to the Qatar transmission and distribution network. Specific BESS grid-connection requirements are defined in project-level connection agreements and may reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) and IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods). Qatar's grid operates at 50 Hz ±0.1 Hz (240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase per Kahramaa Wiring Code 2018). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Qatar's 50 Hz grid. A publicly accessible Kahramaa technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from Kahramaa.
summary.zh: Kahramaa（卡塔尔电力和水务总公司）是卡塔尔唯一的输配电系统所有者和运营商（TDSOO）。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模和表后项目——均须取得Kahramaa技术审查和并网批准。Kahramaa电网规范（2020年输电电网规范）规定了接入卡塔尔输配电网的发电和储能资产的技术要求。具体BESS并网要求在项目级并网协议中规定，可能引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）。卡塔尔电网运行参数为50 Hz ±0.1 Hz（单相240 V、三相415 V，依据Kahramaa 2018年布线规范）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对卡塔尔50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认Kahramaa公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向Kahramaa获取。
summary.zht: Kahramaa（卡達電力和水務總公司）是卡達唯一的輸配電系統所有者和運營商（TDSOO）。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模和表後項目——均須取得Kahramaa技術審查和併網批准。Kahramaa電網規範（2020年輸電電網規範）規定了接入卡達輸配電網的發電和儲能資產的技術要求。具體BESS併網要求在項目級併網協議中規定，可能引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）和IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）。卡達電網運行參數為50 Hz ±0.1 Hz（單相240 V、三相415 V，依據Kahramaa 2018年布線規範）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對卡達50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認Kahramaa公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向Kahramaa獲取。

standards_or_laws: Kahramaa Transmission Grid Code 2020 — technical requirements for generation and storage assets connected to Qatar transmission and distribution network
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Kahramaa Wiring Code 2018 — Qatar grid parameters: 50 Hz ±0.1 Hz, 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Qatar's 240/415 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Qatar's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与卡塔尔240/415 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对卡塔尔240/415 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與卡達240/415 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對卡達240/415 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy Kahramaa's grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Qatar is 240/415 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested; (b) Kahramaa project-specific connection agreement terms — engage Kahramaa at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA / communication interface protocol required by Kahramaa for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, DNP3, or project-specific specification).
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足Kahramaa并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——卡塔尔为240/415 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并重新测试；（b）Kahramaa项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与Kahramaa接触以获取技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信协议——确认Kahramaa对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或项目专属规格）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足Kahramaa併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——卡達為240/415 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並重新測試；（b）Kahramaa項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與Kahramaa接觸以獲取技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊協議——確認Kahramaa對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或項目專屬規格）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Kahramaa grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Qatar; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in the Kahramaa connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Qatar

source.publisher: Kahramaa (Qatar General Electricity and Water Corporation)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Kahramaa's Qatar grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Qatar's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid. Engage Kahramaa at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible Kahramaa technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct Kahramaa engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足Kahramaa卡塔尔并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对卡塔尔240/415 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应在项目最早阶段与Kahramaa接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认Kahramaa公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与Kahramaa接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足Kahramaa卡達併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對卡達240/415 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應在項目最早階段與Kahramaa接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認Kahramaa公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與Kahramaa接觸至關重要。
